SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?disease { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/0> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/1> }
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/studiesDisease> ?disease .
  ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
  ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/armDrug> ?drug .
  ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?result .
  ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/pValue> ?p .
  ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/effectSize> ?effect .
  FILTER ((?p < 0.05) || (?effect > 0.7))
  ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker> ?marker .
  BIND(?marker AS ?optMarker)
  FILTER (?optMarker != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/999>)
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?disease { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/0> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/1> }
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/studiesDisease> ?disease .
  ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
  ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/armDrug> ?drug .
  ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?result .
  ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/pValue> ?p .
  ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/effectSize> ?effect .
  FILTER ((?p < 0.05) || (?effect > 0.7))
  ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker> ?marker .
  BIND(?marker AS ?optMarker)
  FILTER (?optMarker != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/999>)
}

PREFIX pharma: <http://example.com/theme/pharma/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?combo (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?drugCount) WHERE {
  ?combo a pharma:Combination ; pharma:combinationOf ?drug ; pharma:synergyScore ?score .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?drug pharma:hasSideEffect ?sideEffect .
    ?sideEffect pharma:severity ?sev .
    BIND(?sev AS ?optSeverity)
  }
  FILTER(?optSeverity IN ("Mild", "Moderate"))
  FILTER(?score > 0.7)
}
GROUP BY ?combo
HAVING(COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) >= 2)

SELECT ?combo (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?drugCount) WHERE {
  ?combo a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Combination> .
  ?combo <http://example.com/theme/pharma/synergyScore> ?score .
  FILTER (?score > 0.7)
  ?combo <http://example.com/theme/pharma/combinationOf> ?drug .
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasSideEffect> ?sideEffect .
  ?sideEffect <http://example.com/theme/pharma/severity> ?sev .
  BIND(?sev AS ?optSeverity)
  FILTER (?optSeverity IN ("Mild", "Moderate"))
}
GROUP BY ?combo
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) >= 2)

SELECT ?combo (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?drugCount) WHERE {
  ?combo a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Combination> .
  ?combo <http://example.com/theme/pharma/synergyScore> ?score .
  FILTER (?score > 0.7)
  ?combo <http://example.com/theme/pharma/combinationOf> ?drug .
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasSideEffect> ?sideEffect .
  ?sideEffect <http://example.com/theme/pharma/severity> ?sev .
  BIND(?sev AS ?optSeverity)
  FILTER (?optSeverity IN ("Mild", "Moderate"))
}
GROUP BY ?combo
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) >= 2)

### Original Query ###
PREFIX pharma: <http://example.com/theme/pharma/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?target (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?drugCount) WHERE {
  ?target a pharma:Target ; pharma:inPathway ?pathway .
  ?drug a pharma:Drug ; pharma:targets ?target .
  OPTIONAL { ?drug pharma:indicatedFor ?disease . BIND(?disease AS ?optDisease) }
  FILTER(?optDisease IN (<http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/2>,
                         <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/3>))
  FILTER EXISTS { ?trial pharma:hasArm ?arm . ?arm pharma:armDrug ?drug . }
}
GROUP BY ?target
HAVING(COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) > 2)

  ?target a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Target> .
  ?target <http://example.com/theme/pharma/inPathway> ?pathway .
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  ?drug a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Drug> .
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/indicatedFor> ?disease .
  BIND(?disease AS ?optDisease)
  FILTER ((?optDisease IN (<http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/2>, <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/3>)) && EXISTS { ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm . ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/armDrug> ?drug . })
}
GROUP BY ?target
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) > 2)

SELECT ?target (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?drugCount) WHERE {
  ?target a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Target> .
  ?target <http://example.com/theme/pharma/inPathway> ?pathway .
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  ?drug a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Drug> .
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/indicatedFor> ?disease .
  BIND(?disease AS ?optDisease)
  FILTER ((?optDisease IN (<http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/2>, <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/3>)) && EXISTS { ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm . ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/armDrug> ?drug . })
}
GROUP BY ?target
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) > 2)

PREFIX pharma: <http://example.com/theme/pharma/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?drug ?disease WHERE {
  ?trial a pharma:ClinicalTrial ; pharma:studiesDisease ?disease ; pharma:hasArm ?arm .
  ?arm pharma:armDrug ?drug ; pharma:hasResult ?result .
  ?result pharma:responseRate ?rate .
  FILTER(?rate > 0.6)
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?drug pharma:indicatedFor ?disease . }
  OPTIONAL { ?drug pharma:targets ?target . BIND(?target AS ?optTarget) }
  FILTER(?optTarget != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/target/0>)
}

SELECT ?drug ?disease WHERE {
  ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?result .
  ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/responseRate> ?rate .
  FILTER (?rate > 0.6)
  ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/studiesDisease> ?disease .
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
  ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/armDrug> ?drug .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/indicatedFor> ?disease .
  }
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  BIND(?target AS ?optTarget)
  FILTER (?optTarget != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/target/0>)
}

SELECT ?drug ?disease WHERE {
  ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?result .
  ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/responseRate> ?rate .
  FILTER (?rate > 0.6)
  ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/studiesDisease> ?disease .
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
  ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/armDrug> ?drug .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/indicatedFor> ?disease .
  }
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  BIND(?target AS ?optTarget)
  FILTER (?optTarget != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/target/0>)
}

PREFIX pharma: <http://example.com/theme/pharma/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?count) WHERE {
  { ?drug a pharma:Drug ; pharma:hasMolecule ?mol . }
  UNION
  { ?combo a pharma:Combination ; pharma:combinationOf ?drug .
    ?drug pharma:hasMolecule ?mol . }
  ?mol pharma:inClass ?class .
  OPTIONAL { ?class pharma:name ?optName . BIND(?optName AS ?optClassName) }
  FILTER(?optClassName != "")
  MINUS { ?drug pharma:contraindicatedFor ?disease .
          FILTER(?disease IN (<http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/4>,
                              <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/5>)) }
}

   │           Var (name=drug) (bindingState=bound)
   └── ExtensionElem (count)

            Var (name=drug) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    ?drug a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Drug> .
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasMolecule> ?mol .
    ?mol <http://example.com/theme/pharma/inClass> ?class .
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?combo a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Combination> .
    ?combo <http://example.com/theme/pharma/combinationOf> ?drug .
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasMolecule> ?mol .
    ?mol <http://example.com/theme/pharma/inClass> ?class .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?class <http://example.com/theme/pharma/name> ?optName .
    BIND(?optName AS ?optClassName)
  }
  FILTER (?optClassName != "")
  MINUS {
    VALUES ?disease { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/4> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/5> }
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/contraindicatedFor> ?disease .
  }
}

39.147 ms/op
# Warmup Iteration   2: 32.671 ms/op

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    ?drug a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Drug> .
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasMolecule> ?mol .
    ?mol <http://example.com/theme/pharma/inClass> ?class .
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?combo a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Combination> .
    ?combo <http://example.com/theme/pharma/combinationOf> ?drug .
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasMolecule> ?mol .
    ?mol <http://example.com/theme/pharma/inClass> ?class .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?class <http://example.com/theme/pharma/name> ?optName .
    BIND(?optName AS ?optClassName)
  }
  FILTER (?optClassName != "")
  MINUS {
    VALUES ?disease { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/4> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/5> }
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/contraindicatedFor> ?disease .
  }
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?trial) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?marker { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/0>
                   <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/1>
                   <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/2> }
  ?trial a pharma:ClinicalTrial ; pharma:hasArm ?arm .
  ?arm pharma:hasResult ?result .
  ?result pharma:biomarker ?marker ; pharma:pValue ?p .
  OPTIONAL { ?result pharma:effectSize ?effect . BIND(?effect AS ?optEffect) }
  FILTER(?optEffect > 0.3)
  FILTER(?p < 0.05 || ?p = 0.05)
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?trial) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?marker { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/0> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/1> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/2> }
  ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker> ?marker .
  ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/pValue> ?p .
  FILTER ((?p < 0.05) || (?p = 0.05))
  ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?result .
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
  ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .
  ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/effectSize> ?effect .
  BIND(?effect AS ?optEffect)
  FILTER (?optEffect > 0.3)
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?trial) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?marker { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/0> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/1> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/2> }

  ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/pValue> ?p .
  FILTER ((?p < 0.05) || (?p = 0.05))
  ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?result .
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
  ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .

PREFIX pharma: <http://example.com/theme/pharma/>

SELECT ?combo (COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) AS ?sharedTargets) WHERE {
  ?combo a pharma:Combination ; pharma:combinationOf ?drugA ; pharma:combinationOf ?drugB .
  FILTER(?drugA != ?drugB)
  ?drugA pharma:targets ?target .
  ?drugB pharma:targets ?target .
  OPTIONAL { ?drugA pharma:hasSideEffect ?sideEffect . BIND(?sideEffect AS ?optSideEffect) }
  FILTER(?optSideEffect != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/side-effect/0>)
  FILTER EXISTS { ?drugB pharma:hasSideEffect ?sideEffect2 . }
}
GROUP BY ?combo
HAVING(COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) > 1)

SELECT ?combo (COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) AS ?sharedTargets) WHERE {
  ?drugA <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  ?drugB <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  ?drugA <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasSideEffect> ?sideEffect .
  BIND(?sideEffect AS ?optSideEffect)
  ?combo <http://example.com/theme/pharma/combinationOf> ?drugA .
  ?combo <http://example.com/theme/pharma/combinationOf> ?drugB .
  ?combo a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Combination> .
  FILTER (?drugA != ?drugB)
  FILTER ((?optSideEffect != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/side-effect/0>) && EXISTS { ?drugB <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasSideEffect> ?sideEffect2 . })
}
GROUP BY ?combo
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) > 1)

SELECT ?combo (COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) AS ?sharedTargets) WHERE {
  ?drugA <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  ?drugB <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  ?drugA <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasSideEffect> ?sideEffect .
  BIND(?sideEffect AS ?optSideEffect)
  ?combo <http://example.com/theme/pharma/combinationOf> ?drugA .
  ?combo <http://example.com/theme/pharma/combinationOf> ?drugB .
  ?combo a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Combination> .
  FILTER (?drugA != ?drugB)
  FILTER ((?optSideEffect != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/side-effect/0>) && EXISTS { ?drugB <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasSideEffect> ?sideEffect2 . })
}
GROUP BY ?combo
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) > 1)

PREFIX pharma: <http://example.com/theme/pharma/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?arm) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?trial a pharma:ClinicalTrial ; pharma:hasArm ?arm .
  { ?arm pharma:armComparator ?comp . }
  UNION
  { ?arm pharma:armDrug ?comp . }
  OPTIONAL { ?comp pharma:name ?optName . BIND(?optName AS ?optCompName) }
  FILTER(?optCompName != "")
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?arm pharma:hasResult ?r . ?r pharma:pValue ?p .
                      FILTER(?p IN (0.08, 0.09)) }
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?arm) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .
    ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
    ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/armComparator> ?comp .
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .
    ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
    ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/armDrug> ?comp .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?comp <http://example.com/theme/pharma/name> ?optName .
    BIND(?optName AS ?optCompName)
  }
  FILTER ((?optCompName != "") && NOT EXISTS { ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?r . ?r <http://example.com/theme/pharma/pValue> ?p . FILTER (?p IN (0.08, 0.09)) })
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?arm) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .
    ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
    ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/armComparator> ?comp .
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .
    ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
    ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/armDrug> ?comp .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?comp <http://example.com/theme/pharma/name> ?optName .
    BIND(?optName AS ?optCompName)
  }
  FILTER ((?optCompName != "") && NOT EXISTS { ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?r . ?r <http://example.com/theme/pharma/pValue> ?p . FILTER (?p IN (0.08, 0.09)) })
}

PREFIX pharma: <http://example.com/theme/pharma/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?drug (COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) AS ?targetCount) WHERE {
  ?drug a pharma:Drug ; pharma:targets ?target .
  OPTIONAL { ?drug pharma:hasMolecule ?mol . BIND(?mol AS ?optMol) }
  FILTER(?optMol != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/molecule/0>)
  MINUS { ?drug pharma:contraindicatedFor ?disease .
          FILTER(?disease = <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/6>
                 || ?disease = <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/7>) }
}
GROUP BY ?drug
HAVING(COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) >= 3)

SELECT ?drug (COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) AS ?targetCount) WHERE {
  ?drug a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Drug> .
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasMolecule> ?mol .
  BIND(?mol AS ?optMol)
  FILTER (?optMol != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/molecule/0>)
  MINUS {
    {
      ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/contraindicatedFor> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/6> .
      FILTER (sameTerm(?disease, <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/6>))
    }
    UNION
    {
      ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/contraindicatedFor> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/7> .
      FILTER (sameTerm(?disease, <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/7>))
    }
  }
}
GROUP BY ?drug
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) >= 3)

SELECT ?drug (COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) AS ?targetCount) WHERE {
  ?drug a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Drug> .
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasMolecule> ?mol .
  BIND(?mol AS ?optMol)
  FILTER (?optMol != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/molecule/0>)
  MINUS {
    {
      ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/contraindicatedFor> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/6> .
      FILTER (sameTerm(?disease, <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/6>))
    }
    UNION
    {
      ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/contraindicatedFor> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/7> .
      FILTER (sameTerm(?disease, <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/7>))
    }
  }
}
GROUP BY ?drug
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) >= 3)

### Original Query ###
PREFIX pharma: <http://example.com/theme/pharma/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    SELECT ?drug (AVG(?effect) AS ?avgEffect) WHERE {
      ?trial a pharma:ClinicalTrial ; pharma:hasArm ?arm .
      ?arm pharma:armDrug ?drug ; pharma:hasResult ?result .
      ?result pharma:effectSize ?effect .
      OPTIONAL { ?result pharma:responseRate ?rate . BIND(?rate AS ?optRate) }
      FILTER(?optRate > 0.2)
    }
    GROUP BY ?drug
    HAVING(AVG(?effect) > 0.4)
  }
  FILTER EXISTS { ?drug pharma:hasSideEffect ?se . }
  OPTIONAL { ?drug pharma:indicatedFor ?disease . BIND(?disease AS ?optDisease) }
  FILTER(?optDisease IN (<http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/8>,
                         <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/9>))
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    SELECT ?drug (AVG(?effect) AS ?avgEffect) WHERE {
      ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .
      ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
      ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/armDrug> ?drug .
      ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?result .
      ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/effectSize> ?effect .
      ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/responseRate> ?rate .
      BIND(?rate AS ?optRate)
      FILTER (?optRate > 0.2)
    }
    GROUP BY ?drug
    HAVING (AVG(?effect) > 0.4)
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/indicatedFor> ?disease .
    BIND(?disease AS ?optDisease)
  }
  FILTER ((?optDisease IN (<http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/8>, <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/9>)) && EXISTS { ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasSideEffect> ?se . })
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    SELECT ?drug (AVG(?effect) AS ?avgEffect) WHERE {
      ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .
      ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
      ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/armDrug> ?drug .
      ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?result .
      ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/effectSize> ?effect .
      ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/responseRate> ?rate .
      BIND(?rate AS ?optRate)
      FILTER (?optRate > 0.2)
    }
    GROUP BY ?drug
    HAVING (AVG(?effect) > 0.4)
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/indicatedFor> ?disease .
    BIND(?disease AS ?optDisease)
  }
  FILTER ((?optDisease IN (<http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/8>, <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/9>)) && EXISTS { ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasSideEffect> ?se . })
}

PREFIX pharma: <http://example.com/theme/pharma/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?pathway (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?drugCount) WHERE {
  VALUES ?marker { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/3>
                   <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/4> }
  ?drug a pharma:Drug ; pharma:targets ?target .
  ?target pharma:inPathway ?pathway .
  OPTIONAL { ?drug pharma:testedIn ?trial . BIND(?trial AS ?optTrial) }
  FILTER(?optTrial != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/trial/0>)
  FILTER EXISTS { ?trial pharma:hasArm ?arm . ?arm pharma:hasResult ?result .
                  ?result pharma:biomarker ?marker . }
}
GROUP BY ?pathway
HAVING(COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) > 1)

SELECT ?pathway (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?drugCount) WHERE {
  VALUES ?marker { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/3> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/4> }
  ?target <http://example.com/theme/pharma/inPathway> ?pathway .
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/testedIn> ?trial .
  BIND(?trial AS ?optTrial)
  ?drug a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Drug> .
  FILTER ((?optTrial != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/trial/0>) && EXISTS { ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm . ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?result . ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker> ?marker . })
}
GROUP BY ?pathway
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) > 1)

SELECT ?pathway (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?drugCount) WHERE {
  VALUES ?marker { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/3> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/4> }
  ?target <http://example.com/theme/pharma/inPathway> ?pathway .
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/testedIn> ?trial .
  BIND(?trial AS ?optTrial)
  ?drug a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Drug> .
  FILTER ((?optTrial != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/trial/0>) && EXISTS { ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm . ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?result . ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker> ?marker . })
}
GROUP BY ?pathway
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) > 1)

PREFIX schema: <https://schema.org/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?person a schema:Person .
  ?person schema:memberOf ?org .
  ?org schema:department ?department .
  ?department schema:makesOffer ?offer .
  ?offer schema:itemOffered ?work .
  ?work schema:about ?topic .
  ?topic schema:mainEntityOfPage ?page .
  ?person schema:position ?personPosition .
  OPTIONAL { ?person schema:award ?optAward . }
  BIND(?personPosition AS ?positionBucket)
  FILTER(?personPosition IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5))
}

   └── ExtensionElem (count)
         Count

SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
  ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
  ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
  ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
  ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
  ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
  ?person <https://schema.org/position> ?personPosition .
  FILTER (?personPosition IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5))
  ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person <https://schema.org/award> ?optAward .
  }
  BIND(?personPosition AS ?positionBucket)
}

         Count

SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
  ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
  ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
  ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
  ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
  ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
  ?person <https://schema.org/position> ?personPosition .
  FILTER (?personPosition IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5))
  ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person <https://schema.org/award> ?optAward .
  }
  BIND(?personPosition AS ?positionBucket)
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX schema: <https://schema.org/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?entity) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    ?entity a schema:Person ;
            schema:position ?position .
    FILTER(?position IN (1, 2, 3))
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?entity a schema:WebPage ;
            schema:position ?position .
    FILTER(?position IN (1, 2, 3))
  }
  OPTIONAL { ?entity schema:name ?optName . }
  FILTER(!BOUND(?optName) || ?optName != "")
}

         Count (Distinct)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?entity) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    ?entity a <https://schema.org/Person> .
    ?entity <https://schema.org/position> ?position .
    FILTER (?position IN (1, 2, 3))
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?entity a <https://schema.org/WebPage> .
    ?entity <https://schema.org/position> ?position .
    FILTER (?position IN (1, 2, 3))
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?entity <https://schema.org/name> ?optName .
  }
  FILTER (!(BOUND(?optName)) || (?optName != ""))
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?entity) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    ?entity a <https://schema.org/Person> .
    ?entity <https://schema.org/position> ?position .
    FILTER (?position IN (1, 2, 3))
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?entity a <https://schema.org/WebPage> .
    ?entity <https://schema.org/position> ?position .
    FILTER (?position IN (1, 2, 3))
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?entity <https://schema.org/name> ?optName .
  }
  FILTER (!(BOUND(?optName)) || (?optName != ""))
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX schema: <https://schema.org/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?person a schema:Person .
  ?person schema:memberOf ?org .
  ?org schema:department ?department .
  ?department schema:makesOffer ?offer .
  ?offer schema:itemOffered ?work .
  ?work schema:about ?topic .
  ?topic schema:mainEntityOfPage ?page .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?work schema:review ?review .
    OPTIONAL {
      ?review schema:reviewRating ?rating .
      ?rating schema:ratingValue ?stars .
      FILTER(?stars IN (4, 5))
      BIND(?stars AS ?optStars)
      OPTIONAL { ?rating schema:ratingCount ?ratingCount . }
    }
  }
  OPTIONAL { ?person schema:award ?optAward . }
  OPTIONAL { ?org schema:employee ?optEmployee . }
}

SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
  ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
  ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
  ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
  ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
  ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
  ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?work <https://schema.org/review> ?review .
    OPTIONAL {
      ?review <https://schema.org/reviewRating> ?rating .
      VALUES ?stars { "4"^^<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#int> "5"^^<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#int> }
      ?rating <https://schema.org/ratingValue> ?stars .
      BIND(?stars AS ?optStars)
      OPTIONAL {
        ?rating <https://schema.org/ratingCount> ?ratingCount .
      }
    }
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person <https://schema.org/award> ?optAward .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?org <https://schema.org/employee> ?optEmployee .
  }
}

SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
  ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
  ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
  ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
  ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
  ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
  ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?work <https://schema.org/review> ?review .
    OPTIONAL {
      ?review <https://schema.org/reviewRating> ?rating .
      VALUES ?stars { "4"^^<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#int> "5"^^<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#int> }
      ?rating <https://schema.org/ratingValue> ?stars .
      BIND(?stars AS ?optStars)
      OPTIONAL {
        ?rating <https://schema.org/ratingCount> ?ratingCount .
      }
    }
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person <https://schema.org/award> ?optAward .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?org <https://schema.org/employee> ?optEmployee .
  }
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX schema: <https://schema.org/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?person a schema:Person .
  ?person schema:memberOf ?org .
  ?org schema:department ?department .
  ?department schema:makesOffer ?offer .
  ?offer schema:itemOffered ?work .
  ?work schema:about ?topic .
  ?topic schema:mainEntityOfPage ?page .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?org schema:employee ?employee .
    BIND(?employee AS ?optEmployee)
  }
  FILTER(!BOUND(?optEmployee) || ?optEmployee != ?org)
  OPTIONAL { ?page schema:event ?event . }
}

         Count

SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
  ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
  ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
  ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
  ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
  ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
  ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?org <https://schema.org/employee> ?employee .
    BIND(?employee AS ?optEmployee)
  }
  FILTER (!(BOUND(?optEmployee)) || (?optEmployee != ?org))
  OPTIONAL {
    ?page <https://schema.org/event> ?event .
  }
}

         Count

SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
  ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
  ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
  ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
  ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
  ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
  ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?org <https://schema.org/employee> ?employee .
    BIND(?employee AS ?optEmployee)
  }
  FILTER (!(BOUND(?optEmployee)) || (?optEmployee != ?org))
  OPTIONAL {
    ?page <https://schema.org/event> ?event .
  }
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX schema: <https://schema.org/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?person a schema:Person .
  ?person schema:memberOf ?org .
  ?org schema:department ?department .
  ?department schema:makesOffer ?offer .
  ?offer schema:itemOffered ?work .
  ?work schema:about ?topic .
  ?topic schema:mainEntityOfPage ?page .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person schema:knows ?known .
    BIND(?known AS ?optKnown)
  }
  FILTER(!BOUND(?optKnown) || ?optKnown != ?person)
  OPTIONAL { ?work schema:position ?workPosition . }
}

         Count

SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
  ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
  ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
  ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
  ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
  ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
  ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person <https://schema.org/knows> ?known .
    BIND(?known AS ?optKnown)
  }
  FILTER (!(BOUND(?optKnown)) || (?optKnown != ?person))
  OPTIONAL {
    ?work <https://schema.org/position> ?workPosition .
  }
}

SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
  ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
  ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
  ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
  ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
  ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
  ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person <https://schema.org/knows> ?known .
    BIND(?known AS ?optKnown)
  }
  FILTER (!(BOUND(?optKnown)) || (?optKnown != ?person))
  OPTIONAL {
    ?work <https://schema.org/position> ?workPosition .
  }
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX schema: <https://schema.org/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?review) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?person a schema:Person .
  ?person schema:memberOf ?org .
  ?org schema:department ?department .
  ?department schema:makesOffer ?offer .
  ?offer schema:itemOffered ?work .
  ?work schema:about ?topic .
  ?topic schema:mainEntityOfPage ?page .
  ?work schema:review ?review .
  ?review schema:reviewRating ?rating .
  ?rating schema:ratingValue ?ratingValue .
  FILTER(?ratingValue IN (1, 2, 3))
  BIND(?ratingValue AS ?ratingBucket)
  OPTIONAL { ?rating schema:ratingCount ?optRatingCount . }
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?review) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
  ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
  ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
  ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
  ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
  ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
  ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
  ?work <https://schema.org/review> ?review .
  ?review <https://schema.org/reviewRating> ?rating .
  ?rating <https://schema.org/ratingValue> ?ratingValue .
  FILTER (?ratingValue IN (1, 2, 3))
  BIND(?ratingValue AS ?ratingBucket)
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?review) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
  ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
  ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
  ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
  ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
  ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
  ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
  ?work <https://schema.org/review> ?review .
  ?review <https://schema.org/reviewRating> ?rating .
  ?rating <https://schema.org/ratingValue> ?ratingValue .
  FILTER (?ratingValue IN (1, 2, 3))
  BIND(?ratingValue AS ?ratingBucket)
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX schema: <https://schema.org/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?fanout) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?person a schema:Person .
  ?person schema:memberOf ?org .
  ?org schema:department ?department .
  ?department schema:makesOffer ?offer .
  ?offer schema:itemOffered ?work .
  ?work schema:about ?topic .
  ?topic schema:mainEntityOfPage ?page .
  {
    ?work schema:review ?review .
    BIND(?review AS ?fanout)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?page schema:event ?event .
    BIND(?event AS ?fanout)
  }
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?org schema:employee ?fanout . }
}

   │        Count (Distinct)
   │           Var (name=fanout) (bindingState=bound)
   └── ExtensionElem (count)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=fanout) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?fanout) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
    ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
    ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
    ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
    ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
    ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
    ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
    ?work <https://schema.org/review> ?review .
    BIND(?review AS ?fanout)
    FILTER NOT EXISTS {
      ?org <https://schema.org/employee> ?fanout .
    }
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
    ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
    ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
    ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
    ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
    ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
    ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
    ?page <https://schema.org/event> ?event .
    BIND(?event AS ?fanout)
    FILTER NOT EXISTS {
      ?org <https://schema.org/employee> ?fanout .
    }
  }
}

   └── ExtensionElem (count)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=fanout) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?fanout) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
    ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
    ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
    ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
    ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
    ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
    ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
    ?work <https://schema.org/review> ?review .
    BIND(?review AS ?fanout)
    FILTER NOT EXISTS {
      ?org <https://schema.org/employee> ?fanout .
    }
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
    ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
    ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
    ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
    ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
    ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
    ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
    ?page <https://schema.org/event> ?event .
    BIND(?event AS ?fanout)
    FILTER NOT EXISTS {
      ?org <https://schema.org/employee> ?fanout .
    }
  }
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX schema: <https://schema.org/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?person a schema:Person .
  ?person schema:memberOf ?org .
  ?org schema:department ?department .
  ?department schema:makesOffer ?offer .
  ?offer schema:itemOffered ?work .
  ?work schema:about ?topic .
  ?topic schema:mainEntityOfPage ?page .
  OPTIONAL {
    {
      ?work schema:position ?optRank .
      FILTER(?optRank IN (1, 2, 3))
    }
    UNION
    {
      ?page schema:position ?optRank .
      FILTER(?optRank IN (7, 8, 9))
    }
  }
  OPTIONAL { ?person schema:award ?optAward . }
}

         Count

SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
  ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
  ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
  ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
  ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
  ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
  ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
  OPTIONAL {
    {
      ?work <https://schema.org/position> ?optRank .
      FILTER (?optRank IN (1, 2, 3))
    }
    UNION
    {
      ?page <https://schema.org/position> ?optRank .
      FILTER (?optRank IN (7, 8, 9))
    }
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person <https://schema.org/award> ?optAward .
  }
}

SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
  ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
  ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
  ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
  ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
  ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
  ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
  OPTIONAL {
    {
      ?work <https://schema.org/position> ?optRank .
      FILTER (?optRank IN (1, 2, 3))
    }
    UNION
    {
      ?page <https://schema.org/position> ?optRank .
      FILTER (?optRank IN (7, 8, 9))
    }
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person <https://schema.org/award> ?optAward .
  }
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX schema: <https://schema.org/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?person) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?person a schema:Person .
  ?person schema:memberOf ?org .
  ?org schema:department ?department .
  ?department schema:makesOffer ?offer .
  ?offer schema:itemOffered ?work .
  ?work schema:about ?topic .
  ?topic schema:mainEntityOfPage ?page .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person schema:award ?optAward .
  }
  FILTER(?optAward != "")
  BIND(?optAward AS ?awardBinding)
  OPTIONAL { ?work schema:review ?review . }
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?person) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
  ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
  ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
  ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
  ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
  ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
  ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
  ?person <https://schema.org/award> ?optAward .
  FILTER (?optAward != "")
  BIND(?optAward AS ?awardBinding)
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?person) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
  ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
  ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
  ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
  ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
  ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
  ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
  ?person <https://schema.org/award> ?optAward .
  FILTER (?optAward != "")
  BIND(?optAward AS ?awardBinding)
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX schema: <https://schema.org/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?person a schema:Person .
  ?person schema:memberOf ?org .
  ?org schema:department ?department .
  ?department schema:makesOffer ?offer .
  ?offer schema:itemOffered ?work .
  ?work schema:about ?topic .
  ?topic schema:mainEntityOfPage ?page .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?page schema:event ?event .
    ?event schema:position ?eventPosition .
    FILTER(?eventPosition IN (1, 2, 3, 4))
    BIND(?eventPosition AS ?eventBucket)
  }
  OPTIONAL { ?org schema:employee ?optEmployee . }
}

         Count

SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
  ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
  ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
  ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
  ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
  ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
  ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?page <https://schema.org/event> ?event .
    ?event <https://schema.org/position> ?eventPosition .
    FILTER (?eventPosition IN (1, 2, 3, 4))
    BIND(?eventPosition AS ?eventBucket)
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?org <https://schema.org/employee> ?optEmployee .
  }
}

SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
  ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
  ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
  ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
  ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
  ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
  ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?page <https://schema.org/event> ?event .
    ?event <https://schema.org/position> ?eventPosition .
    FILTER (?eventPosition IN (1, 2, 3, 4))
    BIND(?eventPosition AS ?eventBucket)
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?org <https://schema.org/employee> ?optEmployee .
  }
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX schema: <https://schema.org/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?person a schema:Person .
  ?person schema:memberOf ?org .
  ?org schema:department ?department .
  ?department schema:makesOffer ?offer .
  ?offer schema:itemOffered ?work .
  ?work schema:about ?topic .
  ?topic schema:mainEntityOfPage ?page .
  OPTIONAL {
    {
      ?work schema:review ?shared .
    }
    UNION
    {
      ?page schema:event ?shared .
    }
    OPTIONAL { ?shared a ?sharedType . }
  }
  ?person schema:identifier ?personIdentifier .
  FILTER(?personIdentifier IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7))
}

         Count

SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
  ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
  ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
  ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
  ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
  ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
  ?person <https://schema.org/identifier> ?personIdentifier .
  FILTER (?personIdentifier IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7))
  ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
  OPTIONAL {
    {
      ?work <https://schema.org/review> ?shared .
    }
    UNION
    {
      ?page <https://schema.org/event> ?shared .
    }
    OPTIONAL {
      ?shared a ?sharedType .
    }
  }
}

   └── ExtensionElem (count)
         Count

SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?org <https://schema.org/department> ?department .
  ?department <https://schema.org/makesOffer> ?offer .
  ?offer <https://schema.org/itemOffered> ?work .
  ?work <https://schema.org/about> ?topic .
  ?topic <https://schema.org/mainEntityOfPage> ?page .
  ?person <https://schema.org/memberOf> ?org .
  ?person <https://schema.org/identifier> ?personIdentifier .
  FILTER (?personIdentifier IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7))
  ?person a <https://schema.org/Person> .
  OPTIONAL {
    {
      ?work <https://schema.org/review> ?shared .
    }
    UNION
    {
      ?page <https://schema.org/event> ?shared .
    }
    OPTIONAL {
      ?shared a ?sharedType .
    }
  }
}

1118.342 ms/op
